_comment: VEGETATION DENSITY ROWS (2026-07-14, 'improve the country's tree density') — folded ADDITIVELY over world_stream.gd VEG_STOCK code defaults: a missing key keeps stock, a missing file changes nothing. Counts are VISUAL trees (MultiMesh instances, ~free); SOLID collidable trunk counts stay in CODE — they are the frontier LAW (east>=24, west<=10, roadside<=6, spacing>=1.9m), not dressing. kind: deciduous | conifer | cypress. canopy_a/canopy_b: the two green tint pools instances split between (variety without extra draw calls). No purple.
